errors.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account

login.subtitle: Sign in to continue
login.accountLocked: Too many failed attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.

dashboard.title: KG Tracker
dashboard.promoBody: Add categories like Plug, Collar or Cuffs — separate wear time, stats, and training goals.
dashboard.codeSealed: Code sealed — released when opening is permitted
dashboard.welcomeDesc: Create your first entry to start tracking.

newEntry.title: New entry
newEntry.bildersafeSubtitle: Photograph the set code — it's sealed and only released when opening is permitted. Attached to the current lock.
newEntry.bildersafeShowActionDesc: Retrieve the code (when opening is allowed)
newEntry.bildersafeShowNotLocked: You are not locked — no sealed code.
newEntry.bildersafeShowNoCode: No code is sealed for the current lock.
newEntry.bildersafeShowSealedHint: Released when opening is permitted (lock period ended or cleaning window).
newEntry.bildersafeShowReadHint: Opening permitted — read the code and open the lockbox.

lockForm.title: Log lock
lockForm.keyInBoxLabel: The key is in the box
lockForm.keyInBoxDesc: I confirm it — the box locks with this entry.
lockForm.relockLightHint: Ending the cleaning break — the confirmation is enough, no new photo needed.
lockForm.codePhotoHint: Photograph the lockbox code – you don't need to see the digits (e.g. cover them with your thumb). The photo is sealed and only released when opening is permitted.
lockForm.codePhotoReadable: Code readable ✓ (digits are not shown to you)
lockForm.codePhotoNoCheck: Sealed (no automatic readability check — AI off)
lockForm.selectDeviceHint: Would you like to specify a model?
lockForm.noDeviceWarning: No device selected — the entry will be saved without a device.
lockForm.wrongDeviceWarning: Choosing a different CB will result in a log entry.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.messagePlaceholder: What would you like to share?
feedback.includeContactLabel: I'd like to receive a reply
feedback.emailRequired: Please provide your email or disable the reply option
feedback.privacyNote: Your feedback is sent to the maintainers. Only the message, page name, app version, and platform are transmitted — no username, no IP.
feedback.thankYouSubtitle: Your feedback helps improve the tracker.

openForm.title: Log opening
openForm.modalTitle: You are not permitted to open the device yet!!!
openForm.modalSubtext: Be aware that this will have consequences!
openForm.modalTitleReinigung: You are not permitted to remove the device right now.
openForm.reinigungHintNoConfig: The current session will be interrupted. A new session starts with the next lock.
openForm.reinigungLimitSubtext: You have already used {count} of your {max} allowed cleaning openings today. Another opening will be noted in the punishment log.

inspectionForm.title: Log inspection
inspectionForm.controlCodeHint: must be visible in the photo
inspectionForm.codeMismatchHint: Please show the code clearly in the photo – can still be saved.
inspectionForm.sealMismatchHint: Please show the seal number clearly in the photo – can still be saved.
inspectionForm.policyErrorHint: The image does not comply with content guidelines – can still be saved.
inspectionForm.photoRequired: A photo is required for an inspection
inspectionForm.sealAlsoRequired: The seal number of your lock must also be readable in the photo.
inspectionForm.verifyErrorHint: The photo is automatically re-checked when saving.

settings.title: Settings
settings.timezoneHint: Display, input defaults, and the cleaning and sleep windows all follow this time zone.
settings.startPageHint: Where you land after logging in. Automatic = keyholders go to the overview (straight into the sub if there's exactly one), everyone else to their own tracker.
settings.startPageHintNoTracker: Where you land after logging in. Automatic = straight into the sub if you control exactly one, otherwise the keyholder overview.
settings.hideOwnTrackerHint: For keyholders without their own chastity tracker: hides your own card in the overview, the My view navigation and the green tracker area. No data is deleted — turn it back off and everything returns.
settings.emailNotAvailable: Email changes are currently not available.
settings.pushDenied: Notifications blocked – please enable them in browser settings.
settings.pushRegisterFailed: Push registration failed – please try again.
settings.pushNotSupported: Notifications are not supported in this browser.
settings.pushIosNotInstalled: Install the app to your home screen first to enable push notifications.
settings.pushIosOld: Push notifications require iOS 16.4 or later. Please update your device.
settings.statsEmpty: Statistics will appear after your first lock-up entry.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.upstreamBannerTitle: {count, plural, =1 {1 newer version available} other {# newer versions available}}
changelog.upstreamBannerHint: The following changes have not been installed yet. Self-hosters: docker compose pull && docker compose up -d

stats.title: Statistics
stats.showMore: {count, plural, one {Show 1 more month} other {Show # more months}}

admin.title: User management
admin.overviewDesc: Live status of all subs you control — with quick actions for inspections and locks.
admin.userManagementDesc: Create users, set their role and keyholders, or delete them.
admin.sectionAccountDesc: Username, email and password of this sub. You can change their email and password here.
admin.roleDesc: Sets whether this user is a normal sub or an administrator. Admins manage the instance and automatically control every sub.
admin.sectionReinigungDesc: Lets the sub briefly open the device for cleaning without it counting as a regular opening. Here you decide whether, how often and how long it's allowed.
admin.sectionReasonsDesc: Customize the selectable reasons the sub can pick when logging an orgasm or an opening.
admin.sectionAutoKontrolleDesc: Lets the system send inspection requests to the sub on its own, without you triggering them manually.
admin.sectionAppDesc: App behaviour for this sub — e.g. whether photo upload on mobile shows the file picker instead of the camera.
admin.notifyDesc: Which events of this sub are reported to you by email and/or push.
admin.sectionVorgabenDesc: Targets for wear time (per day/week/month/year) over a period. The sub sees their progress against these targets.
admin.sectionDangerDesc: Irreversible actions. Deleting removes the sub's account and all associated data permanently.
admin.requestOrgasmHint: Instruction or opportunity for an orgasm
admin.orgasmReqArtHint: If set, only this type counts as fulfilled.
admin.orgasmReqOpenAllowedHint: The sub may open the device to orgasm within the window without violating an active lock period.
admin.orgasmReqEndAfterStart: The end must be after the start.
admin.minDurationHint: A lock duration is automatically created after locking up.
admin.sperrUntilHint: Absolute lock end (wall clock) — stays fixed; locking up late does not shift it.
admin.reinigungErlaubtHint: Cleaning openings don't break the lock and aren't flagged as unauthorised openings (provided the user is generally allowed to clean).
admin.strafbuchNoEntries: No entries in the punishment log.
admin.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account.
admin.editLockDurationHint: Change or withdraw the active lock duration
admin.endetHintSperrzeit: Lock duration ends at the selected time
admin.futureDateRequired: Time must be in the future
admin.scheduleAtHint: Request is sent at this time; hidden from the sub until then.
admin.scheduleDelayHint: Request is sent after this delay; hidden from the sub until then.
admin.scheduleFutureRequired: Send time must be in the future
admin.keyholdersDesc: Users allowed to control this sub (keyholders). They can see the sub and later issue directives — but never control themselves.
admin.keyholdersNoCandidates: No assignable users — only non-admins can be keyholders (admins already control every sub). Create a user with the User role for this.
admin.autoKontrolleDesc: Automatically send a random number of inspections per day, randomly spread across the day.
admin.reasonOrgasmNote: For a sub-type write “Main – Sub” (e.g. “Orgasmus – Masturbation”). The sub then sees two dependent dropdowns.
admin.reasonReinigungNote: “Cleaning” is fixed and cannot be removed (only renamed).
admin.reinigungFensterEmpty: No window — cleaning anytime (within lock period + quota).
admin.keyholderInstructionsDesc: Free-text rules for the AI keyholder acting over the MCP. The AI reads them and generally follows them (soft guidance, not enforced). You can always log in and intervene.
admin.keyholderInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g. Be strict with me. If I don't reach half of the weekly wear time on my own, demand it. Max lock period 24h. At most one lock request per 24h. Threaten penalties if I don't cooperate.
admin.mobileUploadAdminDesc: Show file picker instead of direct camera on mobile
admin.notifyMailDesc: Admin receives email notifications for this user's actions
admin.notifyPushDesc: Requires push notifications enabled in admin settings
admin.demoDesc: Creates «DemoUser» with 20 sessions, training goals & orgasms. Password:
admin.noUsersDesc: Create the first user to start managing.
admin.sectionLanguageDesc: This sub's language for the app, e-mails and push notifications (e.g. inspection reminders). You can set it here — the sub can also change it in their own settings.
admin.sectionInspectionEscalationDesc: Sends a reminder for overdue inspections and can automatically mark the device as removed if it keeps going unanswered.
admin.inspectionReminderDesc: Sends an additional reminder once the inspection deadline has passed.
admin.inspectionAutoMarkDesc: If the sub also ignores the reminder, the system automatically creates an opening entry.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account with this username exists and an email address is on file, an email has been sent.

entryActions.chainBreakWarning: Deleting this entry creates an inconsistency in the lock chain. The partner entry ({type} on {date}) would be orphaned.
entryActions.partnerChanged: The partner entry has changed. Please reload the page.

installBanner.title: Install app
installBanner.androidDesc: Add KG Tracker to your home screen for faster access.

sessionGuard.switched: You were redirected to a different account — reloading.

offline.photoRequiresConnection: Photo upload requires an internet connection.
offline.pendingEntries: {count, plural, =1 {1 entry waiting to sync} other {# entries waiting to sync}}
offline.savedOffline: Saved offline — will sync when connected

passkey.title: Passkeys
passkey.deviceNamePrompt: Name for this passkey (e.g. iPhone, MacBook):

wearForm.inactiveCategories: {count, plural, =1 {Not currently worn (1)} other {Not currently worn (#)}}
wearForm.photoRequired: A photo is required for this category

categories.title: Categories
categories.name: Name
categories.trackingEnabledHint: When on, devices in this category can be tracked in sessions. Otherwise inventory only.
categories.requirePhotoHint: When on, WEAR_BEGIN entries need a photo (similar to KG lock).
categories.allowVorgabenHint: When on, admin can set training goals (day/week/month) for this category.
categories.featuresKg: Photo required · Seal detection · Inspections · Cleaning pauses
categories.emptyDescription: Add categories like Plug, Collar or Cuffs to track them separately.
categories.usageStats: {devices, plural, =0 {No devices} =1 {1 device} other {# devices}} · {vorgaben, plural, =0 {no goals} =1 {1 goal} other {# goals}}

devices.title: My devices
devices.emptyDescription: Add your first device (chastity belt, plug, collar, …) to start tracking wear time.
devices.name: Name
devices.referencesHint: Example photos per device improve automatic device detection. Upload good shots or import them from your lock photos.
devices.deleteConfirm: Really delete this device? This cannot be undone.
devices.archiveConfirm: This device will be archived because it has been used in sessions. It will no longer appear in the selection.

emails.penaltyMessage: The keyholder has issued a penalty: {reason}
emails.penaltyMessageNoReason: The keyholder has issued a penalty.
emails.lockPeriodWithdrawnMessage: The keyholder has lifted your active lock period.
emails.lockRequestWithdrawnMessage: The keyholder has withdrawn the lock-up request.
emails.lockPeriodChangedMessage: The keyholder has changed the end of your lock period to {date}.
emails.lockPeriodChangedMessageIndefinite: The keyholder has set your lock period to indefinite.
emails.orgasmWithdrawnMessage: The keyholder has withdrawn the open orgasm directive/opportunity.
emails.inspectionConfirmedMessage: The keyholder has confirmed your submitted inspection.
emails.inspectionRejectedMessage: The keyholder has rejected your inspection — please submit a new one.
emails.inspectionResolvedWithdrawnMessage: The keyholder has withdrawn the requested inspection.
emails.inspectionRequestedIntro: An inspection has been requested. Please create an inspection entry with a photo within the next {hours, plural, one {# hour} other {# hours}}.
emails.inspectionCodeLabelSeal: Your seal number (must be visible in the photo):
emails.inspectionCodeLabelControl: Your inspection code (must be visible in the photo):
emails.inspectionSealHintText: The seal number of your device must be legible in the same photo.
emails.inspectionLinkFallback: If you can't open the link, go to: {link}
emails.inspectionHelpText: New here or unsure what's expected? Here's how an inspection works:
emails.inspectionPushSeal: Include the seal number in the photo
emails.lockPeriodSetBody: The keyholder has set a lock period. You may not open during this time.
emails.lockRequestBody: The keyholder has asked you to lock up.
emails.lockMinWearLabel: Minimum wear time after locking up:
emails.lockPushRequestBody: The keyholder is asking you to lock up.
emails.orgasmAnweisungIntro: The keyholder directs you to log an orgasm within this time window.
emails.orgasmGelegenheitIntro: The keyholder gives you the opportunity for an orgasm within this time window.
emails.orgasmOpenAllowedText: You may open for the orgasm within this window.
emails.passwordResetIntro: you have requested a password reset.
emails.passwordResetValidity: The link is valid for 1 hour.
emails.passwordResetIgnore: If you didn't make this request, you can ignore this e-mail.
emails.inspectionReminderMessage: Your inspection with code {code} is overdue. Please submit it soon.
emails.inspectionAutoRemovedMessageSub: Your inspection with code {code} was not answered in time and was automatically recorded as an opening.
emails.inspectionAutoRemovedMessageKeyholder: {username} did not answer the inspection with code {code}. The system automatically created an opening entry — please review it in the penalty log.
